creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: danfe

Log:
  - Amend the list of recognized newfs(8) options
  - Fix mounting of VFAT which FreeBSD calls "msdos[fs]"
  - GC `devel/py-six' dependency, unused since v20.2

  PR:	250496
